# fly_mpg_user (Resource)

Manages a user in a Fly.io Managed Postgres (MPG) cluster. Import using cluster_id/username.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_mpg_user" "example" {
  cluster_id = fly_mpg_cluster.example.id
  username   = "app_user"
  role       = "readwrite"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) The ID of the MPG cluster. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `username` (String) The username. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `role` (String) The role of the user.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the user.
